scripts.build: npm run contracts:generate && npm run build:packages && npm run build:apps
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @phub/domain && npm run build -w @phub/config && npm run build -w @phub/database && npm run build -w @phub/api-contracts && npm run build -w @phub/api-sdk && npm run build -w @phub/auth && npm run build -w @phub/observability && npm run build -w @phub/viva-adapter && npm run build -w @phub/viva-client-adapter && npm run build -w @phub/ui && npm run build -w @phub/testing
scripts.build:apps: npm run build -w @phub/api && npm run build -w @phub/worker && npm run build -w @phub/realtime && npm run build -w @phub/migrator && npm run build -w @phub/web && npm run build -w @phub/mobile && npm run build -w @phub/cup-admin
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.node.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.web-app.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.mobile.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.cup.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.tools.json --noEmit
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run contracts:lint && npm test && npm run build
scripts.contracts:lint: node --import tsx scripts/verify-imported-contract.ts && redocly lint openapi.yaml contracts/openapi/user/v1/openapi.yaml contracts/openapi/admin/v1/openapi.yaml contracts/openapi/internal/v1/openapi.yaml
